creator: marcel@herrbischoff.com
text:
Created attachment 238867
Update to v4.7.4

- Add environment variable to suppress update dialog
- Update JDK to v17 to satisfy future requirement

Changes: https://github.com/theotherp/nzbhydra2/blob/v4.7.4/changelog.md

Builds, runs and passes portlint. The patch also contains a maintainer change to myself since the current maintainer feedback timed out with my last patch. Feel free to discard that change if deemed inappropriate at this time.
